claims.summary: Bidirectional websocket connectivity can ghost if telemetry or sensory messages are stale while sockets stay open; bridge reciprocity must distinguish stale telemetry, stale sensory, both-stale, and reflective-silence waiting windows.
PressureTrendSampleV1 needs a semantic_coherence_delta so the bridge can tell whether meaning alignment is improving or degrading over time, not only raw semantic trickle or viscosity.
Mode-packing and porosity stress should surface pressure/porosity expansion candidates without applying live pressure, porosity, fill, PI, sensory cadence, or controller changes.
Lowering PRESSURE_TREND_SMOOTHING_HIGH_ENTROPY_AT from 0.70 to 0.65 would retune live bridge status/prompt diagnostics and should remain explicit steward/operator-gated pending replay evidence.
